title: AllTheOres SpawnNoMore
description: Prevents AllTheOres mod from spawning the ores leaving that process to the original mods adding those ores.
body:
AllTheOres SpawnNoMore disables the ore spawn function in "AllTheOres" mod leaving the ore spawning process to the mods itself.

Suggested to use with **"Almost Unified"** and set ATO as the main ingots etc.

This way everything you mine/craft will be a ATO ingot/raw_ore/gear instead of splitted between 12938 mods.

Technical Disclaimer: 
This is a simple datapack packed into a .jar, it overrides the spawn functions for ores below:
[Ores that will NOT spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05f18118bd02c19273a8136208f273fff726334d.png)
